summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SIPRO Phase 2 features. All backend APIs (100% success) and frontend functionality working perfectly. New modules: Finance, Construction, Notifications, Appointments all functional. WhatsApp integration remains MOCKED as expected.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin login (admin@sipro.com / admin123) - successful authentication
✅ Dashboard KPI cards - Finance, Construction, Notifications data displayed
✅ Finance page - billing schedules with 4 items, collection rate bar, payments tab with 6 payments
✅ Finance page - payments tab shows payment history correctly
✅ Construction page - 6 construction units (A-1 to A-6) with progress bars (0%-85%)
✅ Construction page - units expandable showing phases and tasks with action buttons
✅ Construction page - 'Mulai' and 'Selesai' task buttons functional
✅ Notifications page - 6 notifications in inbox, unread count working
✅ Notifications page - Auto Follow-Up Rules tab with 3 rules
✅ Notifications page - rule toggle active/inactive functionality working
✅ Appointments page - calendar grid with appointments marked
✅ Appointments page - upcoming list shows pending/confirmed appointments
✅ Appointments page - create new appointment modal and form working
✅ Siteplan page - multi-mode views still functional
✅ CRM page - leads list with filters still working (22 total leads)
✅ API: GET /api/finance/summary - returns billing data correctly
✅ API: GET /api/construction/summary - returns construction stats
✅ API: GET /api/notifications - returns 5 notifications with unread count
✅ API: GET /api/appointments/calendar - returns 4 appointments
✅ API: POST /api/notifications/simulate-followup - simulates auto WA for lead (2 rules executed)
✅ All Phase 1 features still working (auth, dashboard, projects, units, siteplan, CRM, deals, WhatsApp, dev report)
